ha62404c4gdcb3g427fg869cgd73587c57d0d: The hag, the crèche and now this.
hd74118c5g6be6g4e38gbec5g3e8d18d50bf8: Every chance we have turns to ashes in our hands. He knows something we don't.
h370dc050ge63cg4f92g9e0ag647fa04e89aa: Either he made a lucky guess, or he really did know Volo would fail...
h0a78f8d4g3b55g4677ga2dag28eb075033fb: ... and that anything else we try is destined to fail as well.
h3c5f6608g15b5g4589gb71agaf30ac6c211a: I don't care about Raphael - what about my eye?
h4f96e970g6a1eg40eega286g2ec778d05026: You've got a replacement at least. But we're no closer to a cure.
h023ab1b5g141cg4483gb711g874b20086ee1: I'll wager that's just what Raphael wants.
h0ae1cbebgcc79g468fgaf66g6cc105a6dcf4: He's just trying to frighten us.
h0849c164g73b4g447bgbb10gbf92fd6d477c: Well I think it's close to working. Every dead end leaves us more helpless.
haa46d0a0g9a62g44b6g89b9g1d023dab4855: I'll wager that's just what he wants.
hb5c76d43g367eg40e9g8617ga6c696c0ba56: I'm not giving up. We've other leads to explore.
hef4e0ba7ge0cag4a0bgac9dg0a030ff9fc29: And what promising leads they are. But you're right - no stone unturned.
h4c74facdg863eg4caeg8a8cgd3e3990e970a: Let's stay the course for now.
h4101c056g3d77g43d1g8c79g78f6701c5892: Raphael will reveal his intentions eventually.
h5593132fg81aeg4df0gb941gf29b5e36575f: I don't want to be at the mercy of a devil. Even if he can help, we don't know his price.
h28f1ed7dg1603g4096g976ege8423f931f89: It's out of our hands. But at least we don't have tentacles.
h7bda2a0ag5fc4g440fg9824gf61c380c3ad7: A joke, if you didn't catch it. Let's get some rest.
h570bf6ceg5d8eg43b8g85b5ga331f0cdc1c5: We'll find a way. And Raphael can go choke.

h06888d55g88c4g41e4ga3d9g3d6d3a0f4ee9: His mockery is just a front. He wants something from us.
